_meta.description: ProphetMap stock universe — manually-defined static fields only. Dynamic pricing scores written to data/scores/YYYY-MM-DD.json by scripts/update-valuations.js

fieldGuide.physicalConstraint: 1=pure software, 5=hard physical monopoly with multi-year lead times
fieldGuide.aiContribution: 0.0-1.0, estimated % of forward revenue/earnings growth attributable to AI thesis
fieldGuide.layerRole: primary=core layer representative, secondary=partial exposure, bridge=spans multiple layers

tickers.name: Microsoft
tickers.thesis: Azure AI consumption + Copilot enterprise penetration drives hyperscaler differentiation as the primary OpenAI distribution channel
thesisFalsification: OpenAI terminates or materially renegotiates Microsoft partnership
Azure loses AI market share to GCP/AWS by >10 percentage points in two consecutive quarters
Copilot enterprise seat growth falls below 5M new seats in any 12-month window

tickers.name: Amazon
tickers.thesis: AWS Bedrock + Trainium custom silicon creates proprietary AI moat while e-commerce AI personalization improves conversion rates
thesisFalsification: AWS AI revenue growth decelerates below 30% YoY for two consecutive quarters
Trainium underperforms NVDA H100 on cost-per-FLOP by >40% in third-party benchmarks
AWS market share in cloud falls below 28%

tickers.name: Meta Platforms
tickers.thesis: Llama open-source strategy locks in ecosystem while ad-targeting AI lifts ARPU through superior recommendation models
thesisFalsification: EU regulators ban Meta AI training on EU user data, affecting >400M MAU
Llama ecosystem fails to reach 1M enterprise deployments by end-2026
Ad ARPU growth decelerates below 8% despite AI targeting improvements

tickers.name: Oracle
tickers.thesis: OCI wins AI workload contracts via low-latency GPU cluster architecture and long-term hyperscaler-alternative positioning
thesisFalsification: OCI GPU capacity expansion stalls — GPU cluster waitlist exceeds 6 months
Microsoft/AWS win >80% of new enterprise AI workload contracts in 2025
OCI revenue growth falls below 30% YoY for two consecutive quarters

tickers.name: Alphabet
tickers.thesis: TPU v5 + Gemini integration creates vertically integrated AI stack defending search dominance while GCP AI services expand
thesisFalsification: Search market share falls below 85% globally due to AI search substitutes
TPU fails to challenge NVDA on software ecosystem breadth — internal teams defect back to CUDA
Gemini Ultra underperforms GPT-5 on third-party benchmarks by >15% on enterprise tasks

tickers.name: Palantir
tickers.thesis: AIP platform converts AI capability into operational systems-of-record for government and enterprise with high switching costs
thesisFalsification: Federal budget sequestration cuts defense AI spending by >20%
AIP commercial ARR growth falls below 40% YoY for two consecutive quarters
Microsoft Copilot for Government achieves FedRAMP High equivalency — directly substitutes AIP for classified workloads

tickers.name: NVIDIA
tickers.thesis: CUDA ecosystem lock-in and leading H100/H200/B200 architecture sustains 70%+ AI accelerator market share through 2027
thesisFalsification: Custom silicon (Google TPU, AWS Trainium, Meta MTIA) collectively captures >30% of training compute workloads by 2027
DeepSeek-style efficiency gains reduce aggregate training FLOP demand by >50% vs 2024 trajectory
ROCm achieves >90% CUDA ecosystem compatibility, enabling AMD to substitute at large hyperscalers

tickers.name: Advanced Micro Devices
tickers.thesis: MI300X + ROCm ecosystem maturation captures overflow demand as NVDA supply-constrained and hyperscalers diversify AI chip vendors
thesisFalsification: ROCm software compatibility remains >20% worse than CUDA on key model libraries by end-2025
MI300X shipments miss consensus targets by >30% for two consecutive quarters
NVDA eliminates supply constraints — TSMC CoWoS fully catches up to demand

tickers.name: Qualcomm
tickers.thesis: Snapdragon X Elite on-device AI inference captures edge compute demand as model compression drives sub-10B param deployment
thesisFalsification: Apple Silicon M4 maintains >30% performance-per-watt advantage on on-device AI benchmarks
On-device AI fails to reach commercial tipping point — <10% of enterprise apps deploy edge inference by 2026
QCOM loses Apple modem contract, removing scale economics for advanced node procurement

tickers.name: Arm Holdings
tickers.thesis: ARM ISA dominates all edge compute categories via royalty model on every AI chip — mobile, PC, server, and automotive
thesisFalsification: RISC-V achieves >15% edge silicon market share by 2027, compressing ARM royalty rates
Hyperscaler in-house ISA development (Amazon Graviton fork) reduces per-chip royalty obligations
ARM annual royalty revenue growth falls below 20% YoY for two consecutive quarters

tickers.name: Marvell Technology
tickers.thesis: Custom ASIC design wins for hyperscaler AI chips (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia) provide durable design services revenue
thesisFalsification: Hyperscalers bring ASIC design fully in-house, cutting Marvell out of design services
Marvell loses two of its top three custom chip customers within 18 months
AI custom silicon revenue misses 40% YoY growth for two consecutive quarters

tickers.name: Synopsys
tickers.thesis: EDA duopoly + Synopsys.ai tools are physical prerequisite for every custom AI chip design — no tapeout possible without EDA
thesisFalsification: Open-source EDA (OpenROAD/SKY130) achieves production-quality tapeout for 3nm-class nodes
AI-native EDA startup achieves 10x productivity advantage and captures >10% market share
Antitrust action forces Synopsys-Ansys merger breakup, reducing pricing power

tickers.name: Cadence Design Systems
tickers.thesis: Cadence verification tools required for HBM/chiplet design sign-off — complexity of 3D IC increases verification hours and pricing power
thesisFalsification: Open-source EDA breakthrough eliminates Cadence's verification monopoly at advanced nodes
AI-automated chip design reduces human-EDA-tool interaction by >70%, commoditizing license revenue
Revenue growth falls below 12% YoY for two consecutive quarters

tickers.name: Entegris
tickers.thesis: CMP slurries and advanced process chemicals face no substitution for sub-3nm node manufacturing — physical chemistry prerequisite
thesisFalsification: Alternative planarization techniques (dry polishing) eliminate CMP requirement at 2nm nodes
TSMC qualifies competing chemical supplier for >30% of advanced node volumes
Node advancement slows — 2nm ramp delayed beyond 2027

tickers.name: Air Products
tickers.thesis: Ultra-high purity industrial gases (N2, H2, O2, NF3) are physical prerequisites for semiconductor fab operations with long-term supply agreements
thesisFalsification: On-site gas generation technology matures — fabs install own nitrogen/oxygen generation reducing APD dependency
TSMC/Samsung qualify alternative industrial gas supplier for >25% of fab volumes
New fab construction slows — CHIPS Act funding disbursement delayed beyond 2026

tickers.name: Applied Materials
tickers.thesis: Deposition and etch equipment required for every advanced node — equipment cycle leads silicon cycle by 12-18 months
thesisFalsification: China export controls permanently impair >25% of annual revenue with no substitute market
Extended equipment cycles at 2nm+ nodes reduce replacement demand by >30% vs prior cycle
TSMC pushes back N2 ramp timeline beyond Q4 2025, delaying equipment orders

tickers.name: Lam Research
tickers.thesis: Etch equipment is critical chokepoint for 3D NAND layer stacking and HBM memory manufacturing
thesisFalsification: 3D NAND layer count growth plateaus below 300 layers — reducing etch complexity and tool demand
HBM capacity overbuild cycle causes 12-18 months of equipment order pause
China export controls impair >30% of annual revenue

tickers.name: KLA Corporation
tickers.thesis: Process control and metrology becomes MORE critical as nodes shrink — defect density requirements tighten exponentially at each node
thesisFalsification: In-situ metrology (integrated into deposition tools) eliminates need for standalone inspection tools
AI-based virtual metrology achieves <1% prediction error, reducing physical measurement frequency by >60%
Node advancement halts — no new advanced nodes beyond 2nm through 2028

tickers.name: Amkor Technology
tickers.thesis: Advanced packaging (SiP, HBM stacking, fan-out) is physical bottleneck for AI GPU assembly outside TSMC's captive CoWoS capacity
thesisFalsification: TSMC CoWoS capacity expands fast enough to eliminate third-party packaging bottleneck by 2026
AI chip architectures shift to monolithic designs reducing advanced packaging complexity
Samsung and Intel Foundry Services CoWoS-equivalent capacity ramps — AMKR loses pricing power

tickers.name: Taiwan Semiconductor (ADR)
tickers.thesis: Only foundry capable of N3/N2 node production + CoWoS packaging monopoly for HBM+GPU integration — physical chokepoint for all AI hardware
thesisFalsification: Intel 18A yield reaches TSMC N3 parity by end-2026 with customer qualification wins
Taiwan Strait military escalation triggers customer emergency dual-sourcing orders to Samsung/Intel
CoWoS capacity fails to double by end-2025, causing NVDA H200 shipment misses

tickers.name: Micron Technology
tickers.thesis: HBM3E production ramp is physically constrained AI memory — only three global suppliers with 18-month lead times and TSV stacking complexity
thesisFalsification: HBM capacity overbuild in 2026 — SK Hynix/Samsung/Micron collectively deliver >30% more HBM than demand
DDR5 commodity DRAM ASPs collapse below $4/GB, dragging blended margins below 30%
HBM4 spec requires new tool investment beyond Micron's current 1β node capability

tickers.name: Celestica
tickers.thesis: EMS for hyperscaler custom AI servers (Google, AWS, Meta) with AI mix rising from 40% toward 70%+ of revenue at improving margins
thesisFalsification: Hyperscalers shift AI server assembly in-house — Google or Amazon announces manufacturing subsidiary
ODM competitors (Quanta, Foxconn) undercut Celestica margin by >3 percentage points on AI server contracts
AI server mix growth stalls below 55% of revenue by end-2025

tickers.name: Dell Technologies
tickers.thesis: PowerEdge AI server backlog provides multi-quarter visibility — enterprise AI refresh cycle benefits established channel relationships
thesisFalsification: AI server mix fails to offset PC/client division revenue decline — ISG growth below 20% YoY
Enterprise AI CapEx freeze — IT spending surveys show >30% of CIOs delaying AI infrastructure
AI server backlog normalizes below 2x quarterly run-rate

tickers.name: Super Micro Computer
tickers.thesis: Direct liquid cooling designs and NVIDIA OEM partnership capture GPU server rack market — first-mover on high-density thermal solutions
thesisFalsification: Accounting irregularities resurface — SEC investigation reopened or auditor resignation
NVIDIA shifts preferred partner designation to Dell/HPE for Blackwell rack deployments
Revenue growth decelerates below 60% YoY as channel inventory normalizes
tickers._note: Accounting risk elevated — position sizing should reflect binary tail risk

tickers.name: Arista Networks
tickers.thesis: Ethernet switching for AI clusters (400G/800G) displaces InfiniBand as scale-out fabric due to cost and ecosystem advantages
thesisFalsification: NVIDIA InfiniBand maintains >60% AI cluster networking share through 2026
Ethernet all-reduce latency fails to match InfiniBand for 10,000+ GPU cluster workloads
Meta/Google build proprietary switching ASICs — ANET loses two top-5 customers

tickers.name: Vertiv Holdings
tickers.thesis: Liquid cooling infrastructure is physical constraint for >1kW/rack GPU density — no AI datacenter buildout possible without thermal management
thesisFalsification: Immersion cooling commoditizes via 3M/Engineered Fluids — VRT loses pricing power on liquid cooling
GPU TDP growth plateaus at 700W and air cooling suffices through 2027
Vertiv loses >2 of top-5 hyperscaler accounts to in-house cooling solutions

tickers.name: Eaton Corporation
tickers.thesis: Power distribution units and UPS systems are required for every MW of new datacenter capacity — backlog growth tracks AI CapEx cycle
thesisFalsification: Modular/containerized datacenter design bypasses traditional PDU vendors for >40% of new builds
Utility-scale direct-connect reduces UPS tier requirements for hyperscaler mega-campuses
Eaton electrical orders growth falls below 10% YoY for two consecutive quarters

tickers.name: Corning
tickers.thesis: Optical fiber is physical constraint for datacenter interconnect AND telecom AI traffic growth — 5-year supply agreements insulate from spot pricing
thesisFalsification: Short-reach silicon photonics eliminates multi-mode fiber requirement in datacenter spine
Fiber supply glut from Chinese manufacturers compresses GLW pricing by >20%
Springboard plan fiber revenue falls below $1.5B annualized run-rate by end-2025

tickers.name: Coherent Corp
tickers.thesis: 800G/1.6T transceiver production is physical bottleneck for AI cluster interconnect bandwidth — only 3-4 qualified global suppliers
thesisFalsification: Co-packaged optics (CPO) fully integrates into NVIDIA switch ASICs by 2027 — discrete transceiver market collapses
Chinese competitors (InnoLight, HG Genuinelight) achieve 800G qualification at hyperscalers — >30% market share
AI cluster interconnect shifts to electrical (copper) at shorter distances — transceiver TAM shrinks

tickers.name: Equinix
tickers.thesis: Colocation and interconnection hubs benefit from AI traffic growth — xScale campus buildout serves hyperscaler overflow demand
thesisFalsification: Hyperscaler build-vs-buy shifts to 100% owned capacity — EQIX loses xScale renewal pipeline
AI inference moves to edge/on-device, reducing centralized colocation demand growth below 5% YoY
EQIX loses >3 of top-10 hyperscaler colocation customers in any 12-month period

tickers.name: Digital Realty
tickers.thesis: Land + power + permits = AI datacenter physical prerequisites — supply constrained in Tier 1 MSAs with 36-48 month development timelines
thesisFalsification: Power grid constraints prevent new datacenter permits in top-10 MSAs through 2028 — DLR development pipeline halted
Rising interest rates compress REIT capitalization rates — DLR cannot fund new development at acceptable returns
Hyperscaler owned campuses capture >70% of new AI datacenter demand

tickers.name: Fluor Corporation
tickers.thesis: EPC contractor for hyperscaler mega-campus construction — backlog growth tracks AI CapEx cycle with 18-24 month revenue recognition lag
thesisFalsification: Hyperscaler construction pauses due to macro downturn or AI ROI disappointment — project cancellation rate exceeds 15%
Labor/materials cost inflation erodes EPC margins below 3%
FLR loses two of top-5 hyperscaler EPC contracts to Turner/McCarthy

tickers.name: CrowdStrike
tickers.thesis: AI-accelerated threat landscape creates mandatory security spending — Falcon platform consolidation wins as CISO budgets prioritize fewer vendors
thesisFalsification: Post-July 2024 outage customer churn materializes at >10% of ARR in FY2026
AI security commodity pricing collapses net revenue retention below 110%
Microsoft Defender AI achieves Falcon parity on third-party MITRE evaluations

tickers.name: Palo Alto Networks
tickers.thesis: Platform consolidation strategy (SASE + NGFW + XSOAR) creates sticky enterprise security stack — platformization billings conversion improves unit economics
thesisFalsification: Platformization strategy shows >20% billings deceleration as competitors match bundling — PANW loses pricing anchor
Free platform trial strategy impairs gross margins below 72% for two consecutive quarters
CRWD + Okta platform bundle achieves equivalent SASE functionality — displaces PANW at >10% of enterprise accounts

tickers.name: Constellation Energy
tickers.thesis: Clean baseload nuclear power is physical constraint for hyperscaler 24/7 carbon-free AI datacenter pledges — Three Mile Island restart sets pricing precedent
thesisFalsification: Grid-scale battery storage achieves <$60/kWh installed cost by 2027, eliminating nuclear baseload premium
NRC relicensing process for Constellation plants delayed beyond 36 months
Hyperscalers abandon 24/7 CFE commitments — spot power contracts replace long-term nuclear PPAs

tickers.name: Vistra Energy
tickers.thesis: Texas ERCOT power market tightness benefits merchant generator — AI datacenter load growth in Texas outpaces new supply additions
thesisFalsification: New Texas wind/solar additions (20GW by 2026) suppress ERCOT power prices below $35/MWh average
Texas Governor signs legislation capping merchant power prices — removes ERCOT scarcity pricing
Vistra's Illinois nuclear plants face stranded asset risk as Illinois grid becomes oversupplied

tickers.name: Cameco
tickers.thesis: Uranium supply is physical constraint for nuclear renaissance driven by AI electricity demand — mine development lead times of 7-10 years create durable scarcity
thesisFalsification: Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan uranium production surges >30% by 2027, breaking $100/lb uranium price narrative
SMR (small modular reactor) deployment delays push beyond 2030 — removes key demand catalyst
Cameco Cigar Lake/McArthur River face unexpected production disruptions exceeding 10M lbs U3O8

tickers.name: GE Vernova
tickers.thesis: Gas turbines and grid equipment have 3-5 year lead times — physical bottleneck for rapid datacenter power delivery that cannot be short-circuited
thesisFalsification: Turbine order backlog growth decelerates below 15% YoY — utility capital spending freezes
Permitting reform fails: FERC interconnection queue wait exceeds 5 years, delaying gas turbine projects
HVDC transmission alternatives displace gas turbine peakers for datacenter power delivery

tickers.name: Quanta Services
tickers.thesis: Transmission line construction labor and specialized equipment are physical constraints for datacenter grid connection — 3-5 year backlog visibility
thesisFalsification: Federal permitting reform accelerates interconnection queue, reducing specialist contractor scarcity premium
Union labor shortage resolves — new entrants capture >20% of transmission construction market
Quanta loses >3 of top-10 utility relationships to EMCOR/MYR Group

tickers.name: EOG Resources
tickers.thesis: Natural gas demand pull from AI datacenter power generation provides incremental volume growth for premium Permian/Eagle Ford producer
thesisFalsification: LNG export price premium collapses — Henry Hub natural gas falls below $2.50/MMBtu for extended period
Renewable + battery cost curve makes gas peaking uneconomical by 2028 — datacenter gas demand growth stops
EOG break-even rises above $45/bbl due to Permian cost inflation — competitive advantage erodes

tickers.name: EQT Corporation
tickers.thesis: Appalachian natural gas proximity to Northeast datacenter cluster provides pipeline arbitrage — lowest-cost Marcellus producer benefits from re-rate
thesisFalsification: Appalachian pipeline capacity expansions approved — basis differential collapses below $0.30/MMBtu
Mid-Atlantic states pass legislation restricting new gas-powered datacenter interconnections
Henry Hub long-term curve prices below $3/MMBtu — EQT returns-on-capital unattractive for reinvestment

tickers.name: Freeport-McMoRan
tickers.thesis: Copper is irreplaceable conductor for AI datacenter wiring, power cables, and grid expansion — no physical substitute at scale
thesisFalsification: Superconducting cable technology achieves commercial deployment at datacenter scale
Copper recycling efficiency reaches 90%+ reducing primary mine supply demand growth below 1% annually
Global copper surplus emerges from Zambia/DRC mine expansions exceeding 500K MT incremental supply

tickers.name: Southern Copper
tickers.thesis: Lowest-cost copper producer with largest reserve base benefits from structural AI-driven demand — Tia Maria expansion doubles Peru output
thesisFalsification: Copper demand disappoints as DeepSeek-style AI efficiency reduces physical datacenter buildout pace by >40%
Tia Maria mine expansion blocked by community opposition beyond 2027
SCCO parent Grupo Mexico faces governance risk — related-party transactions under SEC scrutiny

tickers.name: Alcoa
tickers.thesis: Aluminum demand for datacenter cooling systems and power infrastructure — lowest-quartile cost producer positioned for commodity re-rate
thesisFalsification: Aluminum spot price collapses below $2,000/ton on China production surge — Alcoa cost advantage irrelevant at these prices
Carbon border adjustment mechanism fails to pass EU — Alcoa loses green premium pricing
Alcoa Ma'aden JV faces operational disruptions — Saudi production below nameplate capacity for >6 months

tickers.name: IonQ
tickers.thesis: Trapped-ion quantum computing achieves highest gate fidelity of all approaches — potential to break cryptographic assumptions or accelerate optimization
thesisFalsification: Decoherence rates remain >0.5% per gate by 2028 — fault-tolerant quantum compute commercially unviable within 10 years
Google/IBM achieve quantum advantage on a commercially relevant problem first
IonQ burns through cash at current rate — dilutive equity raise exceeds 20% of market cap
tickers._note: Binary outcome — either transformative or zero. Hard cap 0.5% of total portfolio.

criteria: Gate fidelity sustained ≥99.5% (logical qubit) for 2 consecutive public benchmarks
Minimum 1 commercially validated quantum advantage demonstration (not simulation)
Annual revenue ≥ USD 50M with ≥40% YoY growth for 2 quarters
Cash runway ≥ 18 months without dilutive raise
_graduation.demotion: Remove from universe if any thesisFalsification[0] or [2] confirmed

tickers.name: Rigetti Computing
tickers.thesis: Superconducting qubit approach with full-stack cloud access may achieve quantum advantage for specific optimization problems relevant to logistics/finance
thesisFalsification: No fault-tolerant qubit demonstration (logical error rate <0.01%) by end-2027
RGTI loses DARPA/DOE grant funding — revenue falls below $15M annualized
IBM Eagle/Heron architecture demonstrates superior gate fidelity at equivalent qubit count
tickers._note: Binary outcome. Even smaller position than IONQ — higher risk, less differentiated approach.

criteria: Coherence time improvement ≥10x vs current generation (public benchmark)
Cloud quantum job completion rate ≥95% for circuits with >100 qubits
Annual revenue ≥ USD 30M with ≥50% YoY growth
Partnership with Tier-1 enterprise customer for production (not research) use case
_graduation.demotion: Remove from universe if revenue misses 4 consecutive quarters or IBM/Google dominate quantum cloud

tickers.name: Render Network
tickers.thesis: Distributed GPU marketplace directly absorbs AI inference and 3D rendering overflow demand — price follows GPU utilization rates
thesisFalsification: AWS/GCP spot GPU pricing falls below RNDR network rates for 3 consecutive quarters
Token emission rate exceeds network demand growth — inflationary dilution
Major AI lab explicitly deprecates RNDR in favor of proprietary compute

_changeLog.change: Added to universe — decentralized GPU compute, AI aiContribution=0.65

tickers.name: Bittensor
tickers.thesis: Decentralized machine learning network — subnet architecture commoditizes model training and inference, TAO emission rewards best-performing AI models
thesisFalsification: Subnet validator collusion breaks meritocratic reward mechanism
OpenAI/Anthropic API pricing falls below TAO network inference cost
Regulatory action targets decentralized AI training as unlicensed model deployment

_changeLog.change: Added to universe — pure-play decentralized ML, aiContribution=0.90

tickers.name: Filecoin
tickers.thesis: Decentralized storage layer for AI training datasets and model checkpoints — storage demand grows with model parameter count
thesisFalsification: S3/GCS pricing falls below Filecoin retrieval cost — no economic incentive to migrate
FIL storage deal count stagnates for 4 consecutive quarters despite AI dataset growth
Token emission rate creates structural supply excess vs storage demand

_changeLog.change: Added to universe — decentralized AI storage layer, aiContribution=0.30

tickers.name: Chainlink
tickers.thesis: Oracle monopoly for AI×DeFi integrations — DECO protocol enables verifiable AI inference results on-chain, first-mover with 10+ year network effect
thesisFalsification: Pyth Network captures >30% of oracle market share from LINK in TVL secured
DECO/verifiable AI inference adoption stalls — no major DeFi protocol integrates by 2027
LINK staking yields fail to attract institutional validators — security budget shrinks

_changeLog.change: Added to universe — oracle monopoly, AI×DeFi bridge, physicalConstraint=4

tickers.name: Ethereum
tickers.thesis: Settlement and programmable money layer for decentralized AI economy — AI agent payment rails require trustless micropayment infrastructure; EIP-1559 burn creates deflationary pressure proportional to on-chain AI activity
thesisFalsification: AI agent payment volumes migrate entirely to L2s — ETH L1 fee revenue structurally falls
Solana/other L1 captures >40% of AI agent transaction volume
EIP-1559 burn falls below issuance for 6 consecutive months — ETH becomes inflationary
tickers._note: Bridge role — settlement layer for decentralized AI economy. aiContribution=0.20 (below 30% funnel threshold — will not pass funnel)

_changeLog.change: Added as bridge role — ETH settlement layer for AI payment rails; aiContribution deliberately below funnel threshold
